comment.body:
In stagflation/deflation scenario, lunar cycles could amplify sentiment shifts:
1. Full Moon Volatility: If insiders are suppressing volatility (e.g., via vomma selling, as you noted), a full moon might test their control if retail traders get jittery or overactive.
2. New Moon Caution: A new moon could align with a deflationary sentiment shift, reinforcing cash hoarding or bond preference over gold, as flagged with falling gold futures.
comment.raw_body:
In stagflation/deflation scenario, lunar cycles could amplify sentiment shifts:
1. Full Moon Volatility: If insiders are suppressing volatility (e.g., via vomma selling, as you noted), a full moon might test their control if retail traders get jittery or overactive.
2. New Moon Caution: A new moon could align with a deflationary sentiment shift, reinforcing cash hoarding or bond preference over gold, as flagged with falling gold futures.

comment.body: 3. Monitor volatility spikes (e.g., VIX behavior) around April 11, 2025 (next full moon from today, April 6), or April 26 (new moon), to see if they align with the pivot levels or vol suppression thesis.
comment.raw_body: 3. Monitor volatility spikes (e.g., VIX behavior) around April 11, 2025 (next full moon from today, April 6), or April 26 (new moon), to see if they align with the pivot levels or vol suppression thesis.
